top_signals.title: US and Iran Sign MOU to Settle War, Hormuz Traffic Expected to Pick Up
top_signals.summary: The United States and Iran have signed a memorandum of understanding to settle a near four-month war, senior U.S. officials said on Monday, adding that a signing ceremony would take place on Friday and shipping traffic in the strait of Hormuz…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Energy Shares Fall, Crude Prices Drop as US and Iran Make Deal
top_signals.summary: U.S. energy shares fell on Monday as crude prices dropped after Washington and Tehran agreed terms to end their months-long conflict and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a vital oil transit chokepoint.The U.S. and Iran will sign a memorandum of understanding in Switzerland on Friday…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: General Atomics awarded US Army contract for extended-range artillery round
top_signals.summary: During a test last year, the company's projectile hit targets more than 74 miles away after being fired from an M777 howitzer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Agencies publish resolution plan feedback letters for certain domestic and foreign banking organizations

top_signals.title: Global Shippers: Confidence in Resuming Hormuz Transit Will Take Time
top_signals.summary: Shippers in Asia and Europe said confidence in resuming transit through the Strait of Hormuz could take weeks to rebuild and navigation will only restart once safety is assured, after the U.S. and Iran agreed a framework deal to reopen the waterway.U.S.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ucore, Sumitomo team up on rare earth supply chain development
top_signals.summary: The companies will collaborate on sourcing rare earth feedstock for Ucore’s Louisiana strategic metals complex.
